title: houstonia longifolia var. tenuifolia
intro: Houstonia longifolia var. tenuifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Houstonia, is a flowering plant species native to North America, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Houstonia longifolia var. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
